message:
fix(cli): use unicode-width for correct table column alignment with CJK and emoji characters

Add unicode-width dependency and replace chars().count() with
UnicodeWidthStr::width() for column-width calculations. Padding now
uses explicit space repetition instead of format! width specifier,
which only counts chars, not display width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ crossterm = "0.28.1"
 glob.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
 walkdir.workspace = true
+unicode-width = "0.1.14"
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 nix = { workspace = true, features = ["signal", "process"] }
